upload.title: Parsed demo reality upload
upload.raw:
Need more paying users
Need public demo
Need clearer onboarding
Need mission outcome proof
Need approval gates before automation

missions.title: Need more paying users
missions.next_action: Create first-user CTA, demo promise, and invite 3 target users to upload reality.
missions.expected_outcome: At least one external user tries CYVX.

missions.title: Need public demo
missions.next_action: Publish the public demo page and make it reachable from the README.
missions.expected_outcome: A public demo can be opened by anyone with the link.

missions.title: Need clearer onboarding
missions.next_action: Compress onboarding to one textarea, one button, one recommended mission.
missions.expected_outcome: A new user understands CYVX in under 60 seconds.

missions.title: Need mission outcome proof
missions.next_action: Add expected vs actual result fields and score every mission outcome.
missions.expected_outcome: Every mission has expected vs actual measurement.

missions.title: Need approval gates before automation
missions.next_action: Keep all execution behind human approval gates until trust score improves.
missions.expected_outcome: No risky automation runs without approval.

approvals.action: Create first-user CTA, demo promise, and invite 3 target users to upload reality.
Publish the public demo page and make it reachable from the README.
Compress onboarding to one textarea, one button, one recommended mission.
Add expected vs actual result fields and score every mission outcome.
Keep all execution behind human approval gates until trust score improves.

outcomes.expected: At least one external user tries CYVX.
A public demo can be opened by anyone with the link.
A new user understands CYVX in under 60 seconds.
Every mission has expected vs actual measurement.
No risky automation runs without approval.
